segments.speaker: 题目21/22
segments.text: Listen to an announcement on the University radio station. Attention, students, some notes for the upcoming essay contest. The theme for this year is innovation and technology, and your essays should be between 15, 502000 words. Submit your entries by email by next Friday. If you need inspiration, you can read last year's winners written about the theme art in nature on the University website.
